Container.Name: farm-manager
Container.Overview: Farm Manager — self-hosted PWA for drawing farm fields, sheds, and lines on a satellite map and logging timestamped management events with photos, tracking field use history, and managing tasks with an iCal feed for Google Calendar. Requires the farm-manager-db container to be running first, and both containers must be on the same custom Docker network. Before adding either container run this once in the Unraid terminal: docker network create farm-manager mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/farm-manager/uploads

Config.Name: Web UI port
Config.Description: Port the app listens on. Change the left-hand side if 3000 is already in use on your Unraid host.

Config.Name: Uploads Path
Config.Description: Where event photos are stored. Back this up with the Appdata Backup plugin alongside the database folder.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Replace CHANGEME with the same password you set in POSTGRES_PASSWORD on the farm-manager-db container. The hostname 'farm-manager-db' is the name of the database container — leave it as-is unless you renamed that container.

Config.Name: APP_PASSWORD
Config.Description: The password you will use to log in to the app. Pick something you'll remember.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Random secret used to sign login cookies. Must be at least 32 characters. Generate one in the Unraid terminal with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: ORIGIN
Config.Description: REQUIRED. The URL used to access this app, matching exactly what you type in the browser. For local LAN access use your server IP: http://192.168.1.X:3000 (replace X). For public HTTPS access via reverse proxy use e.g. https://farm.richowen.me. Cannot be left blank — SvelteKit will refuse to start. This value is also embedded in the iCal feed's VEVENT descriptions so Google Calendar links open the right server.

Config.Name: PROTOCOL_HEADER
Config.Description: (Reverse proxy) Header your proxy uses to signal the original scheme. Leave as x-forwarded-proto for Nginx/Caddy/Traefik/SWAG/NPM. Leave blank only if you access the container directly without a proxy.

Config.Name: HOST_HEADER
Config.Description: (Reverse proxy) Header your proxy uses to signal the original Host. Leave as x-forwarded-host for Nginx/Caddy/Traefik/SWAG/NPM. Leave blank only if you access the container directly without a proxy.

Config.Name: UPLOAD_MAX_MB
Config.Description: (Optional) Maximum uploaded photo size in megabytes. Photos larger than 2000 px on the long edge are auto-downscaled; this limits the raw upload size.

Config.Name: PUBLIC_APP_NAME
Config.Description: (Optional) Display name shown in the app header and browser tab.
